# Chase Dovey — cdovey.dev

## Who
Chase Dovey is an AI engineering leader. He designs and secures production agentic systems, builds the guardrails and red-teaming that keep them reliable, and writes about how LLMs and agents work.

## Website
- URL: https://cdovey.dev
- Type: Personal website and blog
- Tech: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GitHub Pages

## Pages
- Home: https://cdovey.dev/
- About: https://cdovey.dev/about/
- Blog: https://cdovey.dev/blog/
- Projects: https://cdovey.dev/projects/
- Resume: https://cdovey.dev/resume/

## Topics
- AI Engineering (agentic systems, agent runtimes, orchestration, LLMs, RAG)
- AI Security (prompt injection, red teaming, guardrails, sandboxing)
- Foundation models and inference internals
- Cloud Architecture (Azure, AWS, multi-cloud)
- Open Source

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/mrcloudchase
- Email: chase@cdovey.dev
